data.description: Umbrella for workstream 3: architecture recommendations balancing reuse with simplicity, optimizing for reliability and maintainability by LLM agents (units small enough to edit effectively without fragmenting the codebase). Includes the bash-to-Python migration strategy (regression-safe, preserving battle-tested behavior), and flags which changes must land inside the limited breaking-change window following the 2026-06-09 internal announcement. Full analysis: session-logs/2026-06-09-architecture-review.md (added by this audit).
data.title: Audit 2026-06-09: architectural improvements
